rationale: The raw mark no-confusion claim must remain a cross-constructor exclusion, not a vacuous placeholder.

expected_type_contains: msame m n -> msame n m
msame a b -> msame b c -> msame a c
rationale: Mark sameness is the finite mark equivalence spine used by later kernel objects.

expected_type_contains: hsame h k -> hsame k h
hsame a b -> hsame b c -> hsame a c
rationale: History sameness is the internal equivalence relation used by extension, continuation, signatures, and packages.
The NatUp certificate must target the semantic NameCert over unary histories and the unary classifier.
The AddUp certificate must target the semantic NameCert over unary histories and the additive classifier.
Continuation associativity must remain the relational four-continuation hsame statement.
Extension determinacy must compare two same-source same-mark extension results by history sameness.

expected_type_contains: SameSig bundle h k -> SameSig bundle k h
SameSig bundle h k -> SameSig bundle k l -> SameSig bundle h l
rationale: Signature sameness equivalence must retain the asking-policy and admitted-middle-history premises.
Base package reflection must remain token-unique reflection from package sameness into source sameness.
Unary additive commutativity must remain an hsame statement about swapped continuation append results.
